zh.Limavady, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 隆多德利利莫阿瓦迪
zh.Limavady District, County Derry, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 隆多德利利莫阿瓦迪 迪斯特利可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster於大約1244年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 隆多德利利莫阿瓦迪時，他的父親Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadi45歲，母親Formaiel O'Caithan45歲。他和Agnes Magness MacDonald至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他於1264年登記服兵役。他去世在愛爾蘭武爾斯特，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 隆多德利利莫阿瓦迪 迪斯特利可特。

zh-hans.Limavady, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 隆多德利利莫阿瓦迪
zh-hans.Limavady District, County Derry, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 隆多德利利莫阿瓦迪 迪斯特利可特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster于大约1244年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 隆多德利利莫阿瓦迪时，他的父亲Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadi45岁，母亲Formaiel O'Caithan45岁。他和Agnes Magness MacDonald至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他于1264年登记服兵役。他去世在爱尔兰武爾斯特，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 隆多德利利莫阿瓦迪 迪斯特利可特。

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster was born about 1244, in Limavady, County Londonderry, Ireland, his father, Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadi, was 45 and his mother, Formaiel O'Caithan, was 45. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes Magness MacDonald. He registered for military service in 1264. He died in Ulster, Ireland, and was buried in Limavady District, County Londonderry, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster est né environ 1244, à Limavady, County Londonderry, Irlande, son père, Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadi, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Formaiel O'Caithan, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes Magness MacDonald. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1264. Il est décédé à Ulster, Irlande, et a été enterré à Limavady District, County Londonderry, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster um 1244 in Limavady, County Londonderry, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadi 45 und seine Mutter Formaiel O'Caithan 45. Er hatte mit Agnes Magness MacDonald mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1264 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb in Ulster, Irland und wurde in Limavady District, County Londonderry, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster è nato il circa 1244 nel Limavady, County Londonderry, Irlanda, il suo padre, Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadi, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Formaiel O'Caithan, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes Magness MacDonald. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1264. Morì nel Ulster, Irlanda, e fu sepolto a Limavady District, County Londonderry, Irlanda.

ja.Ulster, Ireland: アイルランドウルスター

ja.Lochow, Scot: イギリススコットランド
ja.lifeSummary: Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulsterが約1244年にアイルランドコウントイ ロンドンデリーリマヴァディで生まれた時，父Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadiは45歳，母Formaiel O'Caithanは45歳であった。彼はAgnes Magness MacDonaldとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1264年に兵役登録をした。彼はアイルランドウルスターで死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ロンドンデリーリマヴァディ ディストリクトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster(이)가 대략 1244년 아일랜드 카운티 런도더리 리마바디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadi(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Formaiel O'Caithan(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Agnes Magness MacDonald(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 아일랜드 울스터에서 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 런도더리 리마바디 디스트릭트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster nasceu aproximadamente 1244, em Limavady, County Londonderry, Irlanda, seu pai, Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadi, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Formaiel O'Caithan, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes Magness MacDonald. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1264. Ele faleceu em Ulster, Irlanda, e foi sepultado em Limavady District, County Londonderry, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster родился около 1244 г. в местности лимавади, коунти лондондирри, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadi было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Formaiel O'Caithan, 45. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Agnes Magness MacDonald. В 1264 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в местности улстир, Ирландия и был похоронен в местности лимавади дистрикт, коунти лондондирри, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy O'Cathan King of Keenaght, Ulster nació aproximadamente 1244, en Limavady, County Londonderry, Irlanda, su papá, Prince Magnus Yellow-haired OCHAAN O'Cathain Prince of Limavadi, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Formaiel O'Caithan, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes Magness MacDonald. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1264. Murió en Ulster, Irlanda, y fue sepultado en Limavady District, County Londonderry, Irlanda.
